ffmpeg -i "E:\Convert\files\Nanatsu_no_Maken_ga_Shihai_suru_[02]_[AniLibria_TV]_[WEBRip_1080p].mkv" 
	-map 0:v:0 -map 0:a:0 -map 0:s -map_chapters 0 
	-c:v libx265 -tag:v hvc1 
	-pix_fmt yuv420p10 
	-sar 1/1 -aspect 16:9 
	-fps_mode cfr 
	-vf "format=pix_fmts=yuv420p10,fps=24000/1001,scale=1920:-1:flags=bicubic:out_range=tv:out_color_matrix=bt709:out_chroma_loc=left" 
	-bsf:v "hevc_metadata=level=5.1:sample_aspect_ratio=1/1:video_full_range_flag=0:matrix_coefficients=1:colour_primaries=1:transfer_characteristics=1:chroma_sample_loc_type=1" 
	-crf 23 
	-preset slow -profile:v main10 -level:v 5.1 -tune animation 
	-x265-params "log-level=2:level=5.1:high-tier=1:frame-threads=5:rc-lookahead=10:lookahead-slices=6:rect=0:amp=0:rd=3:psy-rd=1.00:psy-rdoq=0.00:rdoq-level=0:rskip=1:aq-mode=3:aq-strength=0.4:bframes=6:b-adapt=2:b-pyramid=1:bframe-bias=0:ref=8:me=2:subme=2:merange=57:strong-intra-smoothing=1:b-intra=1:deblock=0:qcomp=0.60:limit-refs=3:limit-modes=0:sao=1:selective-sao=4:sao-non-deblock=0:limit-sao=0:early-skip=1:constrained-intra=0:hevc-aq=0:aq-motion=0" 
	-c:a aac -b:a 192k -ar 48000 
	-c:s copy 
	-y "E:\Convert\out\Nanatsu_no_Maken_ga_Shihai_suru_[02]_[AniLibria_TV]_[WEBRip_1080p]_HEVC-15.mkv"

	-crf 23 
	-preset slow -profile:v main10 -level:v 5.1 -tune animation 
	-x265-params "log-level=2:level=5.1:high-tier=1:frame-threads=5:rc-lookahead=20:lookahead-slices=5:rect=0:amp=0:rd=3:psy-rd=0.40:psy-rdoq=0.00:rdoq-level=0:rskip=1:aq-mode=3:aq-strength=0.4:bframes=6:b-adapt=2:b-pyramid=1:bframe-bias=0:ref=8:me=1:subme=2:merange=57:strong-intra-smoothing=1:b-intra=1:deblock=1:qcomp=0.60:limit-refs=1:limit-modes=0:sao=1:selective-sao=4:sao-non-deblock=0:limit-sao=0:early-skip=1:constrained-intra=0:hevc-aq=0:aq-motion=0"

	-crf 23 
	-preset slow -profile:v main10 -level:v 5.1 -tune animation 
	-x265-params "log-level=2:level=5.1:high-tier=1:frame-threads=5:rc-lookahead=10:lookahead-slices=5:rect=0:amp=0:rd=3:psy-rd=1.50:psy-rdoq=0.00:rdoq-level=0:rskip=1:aq-mode=3:aq-strength=0.4:bframes=6:b-adapt=2:b-pyramid=1:bframe-bias=0:ref=8:me=1:subme=2:merange=57:strong-intra-smoothing=1:b-intra=1:deblock=0:qcomp=0.60:limit-refs=3:limit-modes=0:sao=1:selective-sao=4:sao-non-deblock=0:limit-sao=0:early-skip=1:constrained-intra=0:hevc-aq=0:aq-motion=0"

	-i "G:\Аниме\Онгоинги\!_36_Осень_2024\DreamCast\Повелитель демонов 2099\[DC] Maou 2099 - 06_Telegram.mp4" 
	-map 0:v:0 -map 0:a:0 -map_chapters 0 
	-c:v libx265 -tag:v hvc1 
	-pix_fmt yuv420p10 
	-sar 1/1 -aspect 16:9 
	-fps_mode passthrough 
	-vf "format=pix_fmts=yuv420p10,scale=1920:-1:flags=bicubic:out_range=limited:out_color_matrix=bt709:out_chroma_loc=left" 
	-bsf:v "hevc_metadata=level=5.1:sample_aspect_ratio=1/1:video_full_range_flag=0:matrix_coefficients=1:colour_primaries=1:transfer_characteristics=1:chroma_sample_loc_type=1" 
	-crf 23 
	-preset slow -profile:v main10 -level:v 5.1 -tune animation 
	-x265-params "log-level=2:level=5.1:high-tier=1:frame-threads=5:rc-lookahead=20:lookahead-slices=6:rect=0:amp=0:rd=3:psy-rd=1.50:psy-rdoq=1.50:rdoq-level=2:rskip=1:aq-mode=3:aq-strength=0.4:bframes=6:b-adapt=2:b-pyramid=1:bframe-bias=0:ref=8:me=1:subme=2:merange=57:strong-intra-smoothing=1:b-intra=1:deblock=0:qcomp=0.60:limit-refs=3:limit-modes=0:sao=1:selective-sao=4:sao-non-deblock=0:limit-sao=0:early-skip=1:constrained-intra=0:hevc-aq=0:aq-motion=0" 
	-c:a aac -b:a 192k -ar 48000 
	-c:s copy 
	-y "G:\Аниме\Онгоинги\!_36_Осень_2024\DreamCast\Повелитель демонов 2099\[DC] Maou 2099 - 06_Telegram_HEVC.mkv"

	-c:v libx265 -tag:v hvc1

	-i "G:\Аниме\[Топ]\Сказание об обручальных кольцах\[DC] Kekkon Yubiwa Monogatari - 10_Telegram.mp4" 
	-map 0:v:0 -map 0:a:0 -map_chapters 0 
	-c:v libx265 -tag:v hvc1 
	-pix_fmt yuv420p10 
	-sar 1/1 -aspect 16:9 
	-fps_mode passthrough 
	-vf "format=pix_fmts=yuv420p10,scale=1920:1080:flags=bicubic:out_range=limited:out_color_matrix=bt709:out_chroma_loc=left" 
	-bsf:v "hevc_metadata=level=5.1:sample_aspect_ratio=1/1:video_full_range_flag=0:matrix_coefficients=1:colour_primaries=1:transfer_characteristics=1:chroma_sample_loc_type=1" 
	-crf 23 
	-preset slow -profile:v main10 -level:v 5.1 -tune animation 
	-x265-params "log-level=2:level=5.1:high-tier=1:frame-threads=5:rc-lookahead=20:lookahead-slices=6:rect=0:amp=0:rd=3:psy-rd=1.50:psy-rdoq=1.50:rdoq-level=2:rskip=1:aq-mode=3:aq-strength=0.4:bframes=6:b-adapt=2:b-pyramid=1:bframe-bias=0:ref=8:me=1:subme=2:merange=57:strong-intra-smoothing=1:b-intra=1:deblock=0:qcomp=0.60:limit-refs=3:limit-modes=0:sao=1:selective-sao=4:sao-non-deblock=0:limit-sao=0:early-skip=1:constrained-intra=0:hevc-aq=0:aq-motion=0" 
	-c:a aac -b:a 192k -ar 48000 
	-c:s copy 
	-y "G:\Аниме\[Топ]\Сказание об обручальных кольцах\[DC] Kekkon Yubiwa Monogatari - 10_Telegram_HEVC.mkv"

	-i "G:\Аниме\[Топ-4]\Fate\Апокриф\Fate_Apocrypha_[20]_[AniLibria_TV]_[HDTVRip_720p].mkv" 
	-map 0:v:0 -map 0:a:0 -map 0:s -map_chapters 0 
	-c:v libx265 -tag:v hvc1 
	-pix_fmt yuv420p10 
	-sar 1/1 -aspect 1280/720*(1/1) 
	-fps_mode passthrough 
	-vf "format=pix_fmts=yuv420p10,scale=-1:720:flags=bicubic:out_range=limited:out_color_matrix=bt709:out_chroma_loc=left" 
	-bsf:v "hevc_metadata=level=5.1:sample_aspect_ratio=1/1:video_full_range_flag=0:matrix_coefficients=1:colour_primaries=1:transfer_characteristics=1:chroma_sample_loc_type=1" 
	-crf 23 
	-preset slow -profile:v main10 -level:v 5.1 -tune animation 
	-x265-params "log-level=2:level=5.1:high-tier=1:frame-threads=5:rc-lookahead=20:lookahead-slices=0:rect=0:amp=0:rd=3:psy-rd=1.50:psy-rdoq=1.50:rdoq-level=2:rskip=1:aq-mode=3:aq-strength=0.4:bframes=6:b-adapt=2:b-pyramid=1:bframe-bias=0:ref=8:me=1:subme=2:merange=57:strong-intra-smoothing=1:b-intra=1:deblock=0:qcomp=0.60:limit-refs=3:limit-modes=0:sao=1:selective-sao=4:sao-non-deblock=0:limit-sao=0:early-skip=1:constrained-intra=0:hevc-aq=0:aq-motion=0"

	-i "G:\Аниме\[Топ-4]\Жизнь перерождённого мудреца в другом мире\Tensei_Kenja_no_Isekai_Life_[06]_[AniLibria_TV]_[WEBRip_1080p].mkv"

	-c:v libx265 -tag:v hvc1 
	-pix_fmt yuv420p10 
	-sar 1/1 -aspect 16:9 
	-fps_mode passthrough 
	-vf "format=pix_fmts=yuv420p10,scale=1920:1080:flags=bicubic:out_range=limited:out_color_matrix=bt709:out_chroma_loc=left" 
	-bsf:v "hevc_metadata=level=5.1:sample_aspect_ratio=1/1:video_full_range_flag=0:matrix_coefficients=1:colour_primaries=1:transfer_characteristics=1:chroma_sample_loc_type=1" 
	-crf 23 
	-preset slow -profile:v main10 -level:v 5.1 -tune animation 
	-x265-params "log-level=2:level=5.1:high-tier=1:frame-threads=5:rc-lookahead=20:lookahead-slices=6:rect=0:amp=0:rd=3:psy-rd=1.50:psy-rdoq=1.50:rdoq-level=2:rskip=1:aq-mode=3:aq-strength=0.4:bframes=6:b-adapt=2:b-pyramid=1:bframe-bias=0:ref=8:me=1:subme=2:merange=57:strong-intra-smoothing=1:b-intra=1:deblock=0:qcomp=0.60:limit-refs=3:limit-modes=0:sao=1:selective-sao=4:sao-non-deblock=0:limit-sao=0:early-skip=1:constrained-intra=0:hevc-aq=0:aq-motion=0"

	-i "G:\Аниме\[Топ-4]\Опасность в моём сердце\ТВ-1\Boku_no_Kokoro_no_Yabai_Yatsu_[10]_[AniLibria_TV]_[WEBRip_1080p].mkv"

	-c:v libx265 -tag:v hvc1 
	-pix_fmt yuv420p10 
	-sar 1/1 -aspect 16:9 
	-fps_mode passthrough 
	-vf "format=pix_fmts=yuv420p10,scale=1920:1080:flags=bicubic:out_range=limited:out_color_matrix=bt709:out_chroma_loc=left" 
	-bsf:v "hevc_metadata=level=5.1:sample_aspect_ratio=1/1:video_full_range_flag=0:matrix_coefficients=1:colour_primaries=1:transfer_characteristics=1:chroma_sample_loc_type=1" 
	-crf 23 
	-preset slow -profile:v main10 -level:v 5.1 -tune animation 
	-x265-params "log-level=2:level=5.1:high-tier=1:frame-threads=5:rc-lookahead=20:lookahead-slices=6:rect=0:amp=0:rd=3:psy-rd=1.50:psy-rdoq=1.50:rdoq-level=2:rskip=1:aq-mode=3:aq-strength=0.4:bframes=6:b-adapt=2:b-pyramid=1:bframe-bias=0:ref=8:me=1:subme=2:merange=57:strong-intra-smoothing=1:b-intra=1:deblock=0:qcomp=0.60:limit-refs=3:limit-modes=0:sao=1:selective-sao=4:sao-non-deblock=0:limit-sao=0:early-skip=1:constrained-intra=0:hevc-aq=0:aq-motion=0"

	-c:v libx265 -tag:v hvc1

	-vf "format=pix_fmts=yuv420p10,scale=1920:1080:flags=bicubic:out_range=limited:out_color_matrix=bt709:out_chroma_loc=left" 
	-bsf:v "hevc_metadata=level=5.1:sample_aspect_ratio=1/1:video_full_range_flag=0:matrix_coefficients=1:colour_primaries=1:transfer_characteristics=1:chroma_sample_loc_type=1"

	-i "G:\Аниме\Онгоинги\!_14_Весна_2019\Бездельные дни старшеклассницы\[AniDub]_Joshikousei_no_Mudazukai_[12]_[1080p_x264_Aac]_[MVO].mp4" 
	-map 0:v:0 -map 0:a:0 -map_chapters 0 
	-c:v libx265 -tag:v hvc1 
	-pix_fmt yuv420p10 
	-sar 1/1 -aspect 1920/1080*(1/1) 
	-fps_mode passthrough 
	-vf "format=pix_fmts=yuv420p10,scale=1920:1080:flags=bicubic:out_range=limited:out_color_matrix=bt709:out_chroma_loc=left" 
	-bsf:v "hevc_metadata=level=5.1:sample_aspect_ratio=1/1:video_full_range_flag=0:matrix_coefficients=1:colour_primaries=1:transfer_characteristics=1:chroma_sample_loc_type=1" 
	-crf 23 
	-preset slow -profile:v main10 -level:v 5.1 -tune animation 
	-x265-params "log-level=2:level=5.1:high-tier=1:frame-threads=5:rc-lookahead=20:lookahead-slices=6:rect=0:amp=0:rd=3:psy-rd=1.50:psy-rdoq=1.50:rdoq-level=2:rskip=1:aq-mode=3:aq-strength=0.4:bframes=6:b-adapt=2:b-pyramid=1:bframe-bias=0:ref=8:me=1:subme=2:merange=57:strong-intra-smoothing=1:b-intra=1:deblock=0:qcomp=0.60:limit-refs=3:limit-modes=0:sao=1:selective-sao=4:sao-non-deblock=0:limit-sao=0:early-skip=1:constrained-intra=0:hevc-aq=0:aq-motion=0" 
	-c:a aac -b:a 192k -ar 48000 
	-c:s copy 
	-y "G:\Аниме\Онгоинги\!_14_Весна_2019\Бездельные дни старшеклассницы\[AniDub]_Joshikousei_no_Mudazukai_[12]_[1080p_x264_Aac]_[MVO]_HEVC.mkv"

	-map 0:v:0 -map 0:a:0 -map_chapters 0 
	-c:v libx265 -tag:v hvc1 
	-pix_fmt yuv420p10 
	-sar 1/1 -aspect 1920/804*(1/1) 
	-fps_mode passthrough 
	-vf "format=pix_fmts=yuv420p10,scale=1920:-1:flags=bicubic:out_range=limited:out_color_matrix=bt709:out_chroma_loc=left" 
	-bsf:v "hevc_metadata=level=5.1:sample_aspect_ratio=1/1:video_full_range_flag=0:matrix_coefficients=1:colour_primaries=1:transfer_characteristics=1:chroma_sample_loc_type=1" 
	-crf 23 
	-preset slow -profile:v main10 -level:v 5.1 -tune animation 
	-x265-params "log-level=2:level=5.1:high-tier=1:frame-threads=5:rc-lookahead=20:lookahead-slices=5:rect=0:amp=0:rd=3:psy-rd=1.50:psy-rdoq=1.50:rdoq-level=2:rskip=1:aq-mode=3:aq-strength=0.4:bframes=6:b-adapt=2:b-pyramid=1:bframe-bias=0:ref=8:me=1:subme=2:merange=57:strong-intra-smoothing=1:b-intra=1:deblock=0:qcomp=0.60:limit-refs=3:limit-modes=0:sao=1:selective-sao=4:sao-non-deblock=0:limit-sao=0:early-skip=1:constrained-intra=0:hevc-aq=0:aq-motion=0" 
	-c:a aac -b:a 192k -ar 48000 
	-c:s copy 
	-y "G:\Convert\files\FBS NF 124 (1080P AVC)_HEVC(09).mkv"

	-i "G:\Convert\files\[DC] Make Heroine ga Oosugiru - 07_Telegram.mp4" 
	-map 0:v:0 -map 0:a -map_chapters 0 
	-c:v libx265 -tag:v hvc1 
	-pix_fmt yuv420p10 
	-sar 1/1 -aspect 1920/1080*(1/1) 
	-fps_mode passthrough 
	-vf "format=pix_fmts=yuv420p10,scale=1920:1080:flags=bicubic:out_range=limited:out_color_matrix=bt709:out_chroma_loc=left" 
	-bsf:v "hevc_metadata=level=5.1:sample_aspect_ratio=1/1:video_full_range_flag=0:matrix_coefficients=1:colour_primaries=1:transfer_characteristics=1:chroma_sample_loc_type=1" 
	-crf 23 
	-preset slow -profile:v main10 -level:v 5.1 -tune animation 
	-x265-params "log-level=2:level=5.1:high-tier=1:frame-threads=5:rc-lookahead=20:lookahead-slices=6:rect=0:amp=0:rd=3:psy-rd=1.50:psy-rdoq=0.00:rdoq-level=2:rskip=1:aq-mode=3:aq-strength=0.4:bframes=6:b-adapt=2:b-pyramid=1:bframe-bias=0:ref=8:me=1:subme=2:merange=57:strong-intra-smoothing=1:b-intra=1:deblock=0:qcomp=0.60:limit-refs=3:limit-modes=0:sao=1:selective-sao=4:sao-non-deblock=0:limit-sao=0:early-skip=1:constrained-intra=0:hevc-aq=0:aq-motion=0" 
	-c:a aac -b:a 192k -ar 48000 
	-c:s copy 
	-y "G:\Convert\files\[DC] Make Heroine ga Oosugiru - 07_Telegram_HEVC(0).mkv"

	-i "F:\Аниме\Онгоинги\!_37_Зима_2025\JamClub\Доктор Стоун\ТВ-4\JamClub_Dr_Stone_Science_Future_03_1080p.mp4" 
	-map 0:v:0 -map 0:a -map 0:s? -map 0:t? -map_chapters 0 
	-c:v libx265 -tag:v hvc1 
	-pix_fmt yuv420p10le 
	-sar 1/1 -aspect (1920/1080)*(1/1) 
	-fps_mode cfr 
	-color_range limited -color_primaries bt709 -color_trc bt709 -colorspace bt709 -chroma_sample_location left 
	-r 24000/1001 
	-vf "format=pix_fmts=yuv420p10le,scale=1920:1080:flags=bicubic:out_range=limited:out_color_matrix=bt709:out_chroma_loc=left" 
	-crf 23 
	-preset slow -profile:v main10 -level:v 5.1 -tune animation 
	-x265-params "log-level=2:level=5.1:high-tier=1:frame-threads=5:range=limited:chromaloc=0:min-keyint=23:keyint=250:rc-lookahead=20:lookahead-slices=6:rect=0:amp=0:rd=3:psy-rd=1.50:psy-rdoq=1.50:rdoq-level=2:rskip=1:aq-mode=3:aq-strength=0.4:bframes=6:b-adapt=2:b-pyramid=1:bframe-bias=0:ref=8:me=1:subme=2:merange=57:strong-intra-smoothing=1:b-intra=1:deblock=0:qcomp=0.60:limit-refs=3:limit-modes=0:sao=1:selective-sao=4:sao-non-deblock=0:limit-sao=0:early-skip=1:constrained-intra=0:hevc-aq=0:aq-motion=0"
